focus: State-authority hardening P3 completion with stale-response regression tests and P4 kickoff spec slice

completed.item: Added runtime control state metadata and optimistic concurrency primitives
Implemented control-panel API expectedVersion checks and conflict response with latest state
Updated frontend save path to send expectedVersion and recover from 409 conflicts
Added integration tests for state metadata and expectedVersion concurrency
Added dedicated phase tracker entries and advanced plan status
Completed control-mutating NL command paths with write-through persistence and authoritative state metadata payloads
Returned authoritative control-panel payload from apply-ai-recommendation mutation response
Added frontend stale-response suppression guards (request ordering + stateVersion checks) for control panel and publisher status polling
Added integration coverage for live NL command mutation metadata and control-state authority
Aligned control-panel data contract schema to include stateVersion/persistedAt and optimistic concurrency request fields
Marked P2 as done and moved P3 to in-progress in plan/task trackers
Extracted control-state sync decisions into pure helper utilities and wired useAppData to shared stale-response guards
Added unit regression tests covering out-of-order poll/version behavior and dirty-edit reconciliation boundaries
Recorded P3 completion notes and launched first P4 scheduler signal isolation planning slice

pending_next: Implement scheduler signal taxonomy and adaptation input filtering per scheduler-signal-isolation-slice1 spec
Build deterministic replay/backtest harness skeleton and initial fixture generation path
Add scheduler unit tests for recheck-heavy versus opportunity-rich signal windows
Update spec-kit snapshot/hardcopy artifacts if this checkpoint is treated as a formal planning checkpoint

session_boundary_recommendation.recommended_cut: Stop now after verified P3 closeout and P4 kickoff spec publication.
reason: P3 exit criteria are now covered by deterministic stale-response unit tests and async-path audit.
P4 is in-progress at the planning/spec boundary with acceptance criteria and replay harness outline defined.
Repository worktree still includes broad parallel changes, so limiting this checkpoint to bounded slice updates reduces coupling risk.
next_session_start_scope: P4 scheduler unit test matrix landing

suggested_next_prompt: Continue P4 slice 1: implement scheduler signal taxonomy and adaptation-window filtering, scaffold deterministic replay/backtest harness over publisher-history JSONL, and add scheduler unit tests for recheck-heavy versus opportunity-rich fixtures.
